---
name: Data source request
about: Propose adding or improving an official public-record source
title: "[Data]: "
labels: data-source
assignees: ""
---

## Source

Name the official source and link the documentation, files, or endpoint.

## Records covered

What public records would this add or improve?

## Update cadence and limits

Describe known freshness, rate limits, bulk files, or access requirements.

## User-facing caveats

What should users know about coverage gaps, stale records, or interpretation
limits?

## Claim boundary

Confirm this source can be presented as objective public-record evidence without
asserting motive, loyalty, or causality.
